path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\01. Fire Emblem Theme.mp3
description: This is meant to be the big Fire Emblem remix of brawl with Sakurai himself involved with it but honestly I don't like this generic epic kinda stuff.
title: Fire Emblem Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\02. Fire Emblem Theme (Heroic Origins).mp3
description: They took a vocal song from Fire Emblem Heroes which was in turn a remix of the OG Fire Emblem theme and made this instrumental remix of it. I don't think the original track is very strong, but I appreciate the mix up in the second half.
title: Fire Emblem Theme (Heroic Origins)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\03. Code Name - F.E..mp3
description: A super fast hard-rock version of this track which does nothing for me. It's got Roy's Hope in it though.
title: Code Name: F.E.
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\04. Lords-A Chance Encounter.mp3
description: A remix of a different track from the first game, it's pretty good.
title: Lords-A Chance Encounter
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\05. Story 5 Meeting.mp3
description: Wild that they renamed this classic track to 'Story 5 Meeting'. Anyway this is a classic that everyone knows. It played on Temple, it was the first and only exposure to Fire Emblem music for so many people, and also happens to be a banger. I even like the main theme part with its looping piano.
title: Story 5 Meeting
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\07. Shadow Dragon Medley.mp3
description: This is such a positive and happy start, then it dissolves into this super high-octane section which doesn't really fit. It's kinda fun though.
title: Shadow Dragon Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\08. Coliseum Series Medley.mp3
description: The coliseum themes from Fire Emblem games typically remix older battle themes. Here we have a medley of two of them: FE4 and FE6's ones, themselves remixes of FE1 and FE4's player attack music respectively. Now you know. I really like how it sounds with the bass. It's very intense but maybe it's a bit too much.
title: Coliseum Series Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light / Fire Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\09. March to Deliverance.mp3
description: Finally, to compliment the legendary With Mila's Divine Protection we have Alm's music from FE2! It's a great track. They took it from Shadows of Valentia which has an excellent soundtrack.
title: March to Deliverance
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem Echoes: Shadows of Valentia

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\10. With Mila's Divine Protection (Celica Map 1).mp3
description: Everyone knows this from Subspace Emissary! Incredible remix of a very minimal song from the NES. They added a Spanish flair and turned it into a total banger. I love the second half where it kinda builds up. Amazing that they chose to remix this Japan-only NES game and highlight it for Brawl like that.
title: With Mila's Divine Protection (Celica Map 1)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\11. Fight 1 - Fire Emblem Gaiden.mp3
description: I really appreciate this remix. I think when it came out it was a lot of people's first exposure to FE2's battle theme and it's great. The original 5/4 battle theme! The remixer went a bit wild and made up their own music for the second half of it. That stuff straight up isn't from any Fire Emblem game. Why not.
title: Fight 1 - Fire Emblem Gaiden
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\12. Lords-Showdown.mp3
description: Cool! Code Name Steam also remixed the FE2 battle theme, although couldn't help but put FE1's famous meeting theme in there, as well as even FE3's final battle music. Why not.
title: Lords-Showdown
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\13. Those Who Challenge Gods.mp3
description: This is the battle theme again, this time from Shadows of Valentia towards the end of the game when things ramp up a bit. This one is too chaotic for me.
title: Those Who Challenge Gods
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\14. Under This Banner.mp3
description: A new remix of FE3's map theme from the first half of the game, which also includes elements of FE1's one. I think it's kinda mid.
title: Under This Banner
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\15. Advance.mp3
description: Another FE3 remix that nobody really asked for, this time of the map theme from the second half of the game. I don't think it sounds that good.
title: Advance
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem

filename: 16. Fire Emblem - Mystery of the Emblem Medley.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\16. Fire Emblem - Mystery of the Emblem Medley.mp3
description: These drums sound super tinny and shit. This one is pretty much just the same as 'Advance' but sounds worse if you ask me. The shoed-in main theme was totally unnecessary.
title: Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Mystery of the Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\17. Meeting Theme Series Medley.mp3
description: This is great. I love that it starts with the classic then covers so much ground. This one goes from FE1 -> FE8 -> FE4 -> FE6 -> FE5! My favourite part is the way it goes into the Sacred Stones part, which is super similar to the original one. They smashed it.
title: Meeting Theme Series Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\18. Edge of Adversity.mp3
description: I have a loose idea of the spoilers that happen halfway through this game when this music plays. I think it's a very dramatic moment, so it's cool that's it's represented here. It's music from a cutscene! I won't watch it in case they do a remake one day and I play it. Anyway I don't really like the track.
title: Edge of Adversity
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\19. Beyond Distant Skies - Roy's Departure.mp3
description: Cool that they added this actually good music from Roy's game. It kinda gives me PTSD though because I tried to complete this game as part of my every-smash-game challenge but found it to be so boring that I gave up. This music is alright.
title: Beyond Distant Skies - Roy's Departure
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\20. Winning Road - Roy's Hope.mp3
description: I really like this one! It played in FE6 and FE7 when you were just cleaning up at the end of a map and victory was guaranteed. It's got that real 'we did it!' vibe.
title: Winning Road - Roy's Hope
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\21. Attack - Fire Emblem.mp3
description: Great track. Love the drums. Love the melody. It has both the music when you attack and also when you are attacked and they both fit together very well.
title: Attack - Fire Emblem
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\22. Preparing to Advance.mp3
description: I love this remix. It sounds so good. Preparation music from FE has always been great and FE8 happens to be the first one I played so it has that special place in my heart. I love the intense orchestra and the marimba (?) playing along.
title: Preparing to Advance
composers: Yoshihiko Kitamura, Saki Haruyama, Yoshito Hirano
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\23. Victory is Near.mp3
description: This isn't as good as Roy's Hope if you ask me.
title: Victory is Near
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\24. Crimean Army Sortie.mp3
description: This is a super long and super epic map theme from half way through Path of Radiance. It plays in an early part of Subspace Emissary, which is how I came to fall in love with it.
title: Crimean Army Sortie
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\26. Against the Dark Knight.mp3
description: Super good, intense battle music. I like the second bit before the loop. Iconic moment from the game.
title: Against the Dark Knight
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\27. Power-Hungry Fool.mp3
description: Super cool harpsichord music for smash! Love that they included this. Wild that it exists, it's the theme for an obscure character that only plays on one map. But so great that they brought it to smash for the vibes.
title: Power-Hungry Fool
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\28. Eternal Bond.mp3
description: They used to call this 'Ike's Theme' and it's great when it plays during his introduction in Subspace Emissary. I don't think it's up there with Crimean Army Sortie but it's great.
title: Eternal Bond
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\29. The Devoted.mp3
description: Banger attack theme from Radiant Dawn. I really like it.
title: The Devoted
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\30. Time of Action.mp3
description: A nice track from when the two armies fought each other Radiant Dawn, but I don't think it's as good as the other attack themes here.
title: Time of Action
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\31. Prelude (Ablaze).mp3
description: I love the original Prelude but this remix didn't need to add all these distorted guitars to make it smash-like.
title: Prelude (Ablaze)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\32. Duty (Ablaze).mp3
description: Great to have an awakening map theme in here like this. I really like this one.
title: Duty (Ablaze)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\33. Destiny (Ablaze).mp3
description: I like the beginning part of this, and I think it would fit in well with any modern fire emblem. It's nice.
title: Destiny (Ablaze)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\34. Conquest (Ablaze).mp3
description: An all-time classic and honestly one of the best Fire Emblem tracks ever. It's so chaotic and frenetic but at the same time it's mournful.
title: Conquest (Ablaze)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\35. Id (Purpose) (Remix).mp3
description: This remix was totally unnecessary because it's so faithful to the original song, it's hard to tell them apart.
title: Id (Purpose)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\36. Id (Purpose).mp3
description: The original is really good. The accordion is iconic and the music mournful and melancholic as well as epic. An excellent final boss music.
title: Id (Purpose)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\39. Lost in Thoughts All Alone.mp3
description: I do struggle with the singing, especially because the lyrics are so shit. And it bothers me that she sings on the wrong syllables, like how she says 'a double edged' pisses me off. That being said I love this main theme from Fates and the tune is good.
title: Lost in Thoughts All Alone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

filename: 40. Lost in Thoughts All Alone (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\40. Lost in Thoughts All Alone (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: I love this music from Fates. I don't think this remix really does it justice though, it's kinda boring. The Ultimate remix is better.
title: Lost in Thoughts All Alone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\37. Lost in Thoughts All Alone.mp3
description: I really enjoy this remix. I'll take anything Fates that they offer! This little remix throws in a bit of 'End of All' too, so its not all just this one song over and over.
title: Lost in Thoughts All Alone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\41. Gear Up For....mp3
description: Love this track! It's giving Conquest Ablaze and other legendary modern Fire Emblem battle themes. Taking the original track and actually speeding it up into a battle remix in the opening is such a fun idea. I often pick this one in tournament!
title: Gear Up For...
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\42. Lord of a Dead Empire.mp3
description: This is a cutscene from Shadows of Valentia but I don't remember it from the game and it's all a bit much for me.
title: Lord of a Dead Empire
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem Echoes: Shadows of Valentia

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\43. The Scions' Dance in Purgatory.mp3
description: I'm not so excited about this final boss music from Shadows of Valentia I like the harpsichord and piano but I don't like the loud orchestra stabs that sound like you're getting punched.
title: The Scions' Dance in Purgatory
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
original-game: Fire Emblem Echoes: Shadows of Valentia

filename: 45. Fire Emblem - Three Houses Main Theme.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\45. Fire Emblem - Three Houses Main Theme.mp3
description: I don't like the Three Houses theme as much as Fates or Awakening, and then on top of that it's got this lame singing. The remix is very over the top. I don't hate it though.
title: Fire Emblem: Three Houses Main Theme
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\46. Fódlan Winds.mp3
description: An instantly recognisable map theme from the early game. It's alright I guess.
title: Fódlan Winds
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\47. Blue Skies and a Battle.mp3
description: It's alright, I like the start, but it adds this ugly dubstep beat at some point.
title: Blue Skies and a Battle
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\48. Tearing Through Heaven.mp3
description: It's alright. I'm just imagining how good it would be if we got all the map themes from Fates instead of Three Houses.
title: Tearing Through Heaven
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\49. Chasing Daybreak.mp3
description: I really like this particular map theme because it's got a beautiful chord sequence in the second section.
title: Chasing Daybreak
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\50. Between Heaven and Earth.mp3
description: These drums just feel like asking an AI 'give me epic battle music for my marvel film'. I don't think this track is that special.
title: Between Heaven and Earth
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\51. Paths That Will Never Cross.mp3
description: This one is fighting against other characters that you could have recruited, so it comes with a certain emotional weight. I don't think it makes for great listening though. I mean compare this to Against the Black Knight.
title: Paths That Will Never Cross
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\52. The Apex of the World.mp3
description: One of the final battle themes. It's a medley of a other tracks from the game. When I compare this to End of All from Fates I just realise that this soundtrack didn't hit the same.
title: The Apex of the World
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem

filename: 54. The Edge of Dawn (Seasons of Warefare).mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 13 - Fire Emblem (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\54. The Edge of Dawn (Seasons of Warefare).mp3
description: I'm sure there is a subset of FE fans who think this is the coolest shit ever, but I for one can't stand for the present of dubstep in my Fire Emblem. Then anime opening-style singing over that? It's a no from me.
title: The Edge of Dawn (Seasons of Warfare)
composers: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
contributors: Takeru Kanazaki, Hiroki Morishita, Rei Kondoh
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 13: Fire Emblem
